_comment: Targeted rebuild spec for the 143 atlases hit by the platform Canvas-fillText AA bug at physical pixel sizes >= 182 (density 2 x CSS size >= 91). Used by GlyphFAB.binarizeCanvas remediation. See ~/.claude/plans/binarize-atlases-curious-falcon.md.

fontSets.name: AA-affected: Arial / Courier New / Times New Roman, density 2, sizes 91-96
